name: dotclaude
description: The design-discipline marketplace for Claude Code. Ships the dotclaude plugin — UX audit agents, IA / a11y / visual-quality skills, code-review and data-integrity guardrails — that Claude Code uses to author project-specific .claude/ kits.

plugins.name: dotclaude
plugins.description: Design-discipline + coding hygiene for Claude Code. Authors a customized .claude/ kit — UX audit agents, IA / a11y / token-discipline / flow-audit skills, code-review and data-integrity guardrails — tailored to your project's actual stack. Targeted flows: /dotclaude:design, /dotclaude:coding, /dotclaude:planning, /dotclaude:testing, /dotclaude:data, /dotclaude:ai-workflow, or /dotclaude:init for full bootstrap.
